name: Gulpen-Wittem (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo and the name 'gemeente Gulpen-Wittem'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Gulpen-Wittem in the province of Limburg, formed in 1999. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo and wordmark 'gemeente Gulpen-Wittem'
